# EMO AI $RELEASE_VERSION

## Changes
- **Freeze**: Core stable — no new modifications
- **Security**: All keys encrypted in Keychain — zero secrets in Git
- **Architecture**: Production-ready CompositionRoot with full dependency injection
- **UI**: 10 screens with complete Design System (glass panels, transitions, skeleton states)
- **First Run**: First-run setup wizard (5 steps)
- **Monitoring**: Real-time performance monitoring

## Attached Files
- `FINAL_SECURITY_CERTIFICATE.json` — Production security certificate
- `MODEL_EXECUTION_CERTIFICATE.json` — Model execution certificate
- `FULL_AGENT_FLOW_CERTIFICATE.json` — Agent flow certificate
- `FAILURE_MATRIX_CERTIFICATE.json` — Failure matrix
- `release-manifest.json` — Release manifest with SHA-256 signatures
- `SHA256SUMS` — Binary signatures

## Installation
See [INSTALL_GUIDE.md](docs/INSTALL_GUIDE.md) for platform-specific installation instructions.
